minimality_decision.reason: Existing proof and reward validators had no caller for the current immutable B2.2c selected projection; one pure adapter and adversarial tests close that source seam without a repository, migration, runtime, or external receipt path.
minimality_decision.no_repository_or_migration_reason: Durable receipt and repository attestation remain a separate WP3 seam; this adapter explicitly labels them unverified instead of fabricating persistence.

review_repairs: E2 rejected caller-invented candidate/context binding; final contract derives both from the selected identity/context hashes.
QC rejected optional legacy handoff and enforces a non-null B2.2c handoff.
QC rejected order-dependent reward-set hashes; final summaries are sorted by computed record hash and permutation-tested.

anti_repeat.next_loop_must_change: WP3 repository adapter source seam; do not reopen validation semantics without a material P0/P1 finding.
